recipe.title: Prosciutto baked fish & garlicky beans
recipe.description: Jamie uses tinned beans, frozen fish fillets and the air fryer to create a quick and delicious mid-week meal.

ingredients.name: 130g white fish fillets
ingredients.note: skin off, pin-boned, from sustainable sources

steps.descr: Peel and finely slice the garlic, pick and finely chop 2...
steps.instructions: Peel and finely slice the garlic, pick and finely chop 2 sprigs of rosemary, then remove the shelf from the small air-fryer drawer and scatter it all into the base. Drizzle in 1 tablespoon of olive oil, then cook for 5 minutes at 200°C, or until the garlic is lightly golden.

on_enter.say: Peel and finely slice the garlic, pick and finely chop 2 sprigs of rosemary, then remove the shelf from the small air-fryer drawer and scatter it all into the base. Drizzle in 1 tablespoon of olive oil, then cook for 5 minutes at 200°C, or until the garlic is lightly golden.

steps.descr: Meanwhile, bash the almonds and sun-dried tomatoes in a...
steps.instructions: Meanwhile, bash the almonds and sun-dried tomatoes in a pestle and mortar with ½ a tablespoon of oil from the tomato jar and a few gratings of Parmesan until you have a thick paste, then spoon over the fish. Drape 2 slices of prosciutto or parma ham over each fillet, also tucking in a rosemary sprig. Drizzle with ½ a tablespoon of oil from the tomato jar and place in the large drawer, then cut the lemon half into wedges and place alongside. Cook for 10 minutes at 200°C, or until cooked through.

on_enter.say: Meanwhile, bash the almonds and sun-dried tomatoes in a pestle and mortar with ½ a tablespoon of oil from the tomato jar and a few gratings of Parmesan until you have a thick paste, then spoon over the fish. Drape 2 slices of prosciutto or parma ham over each fillet, also tucking in a rosemary sprig. Drizzle with ½ a tablespoon of oil from the tomato jar and place in the large drawer, then cut the lemon half into wedges and place alongside. Cook for 10 minutes at 200°C, or until cooked through.

steps.descr: Stir the beans and half their juice into the small...
steps.instructions: Stir the beans and half their juice into the small drawer with 1 tablespoon of red wine vinegar and cook for 10 minutes at 200°C, or until piping hot, then season to perfection, and divide between plates.

on_enter.say: Stir the beans and half their juice into the small drawer with 1 tablespoon of red wine vinegar and cook for 10 minutes at 200°C, or until piping hot, then season to perfection, and divide between plates.

steps.descr: Sit the fish on top of the beans
steps.instructions: Sit the fish on top of the beans. Pack the spinach into the large drawer, season, and cook for 2 minutes at 200°C, or until just wilted, then drizzle with a little extra virgin olive oil, and serve alongside the fish. Finely grate over the remaining Parmesan, and serve with the jammy lemon wedges.

on_enter.say: Sit the fish on top of the beans. Pack the spinach into the large drawer, season, and cook for 2 minutes at 200°C, or until just wilted, then drizzle with a little extra virgin olive oil, and serve alongside the fish. Finely grate over the remaining Parmesan, and serve with the jammy lemon wedges.
